name: startup_indoor_below_heat_floor_warm_day
description: Startup heating recovery on warm day with cold indoor

verdict.summary: On warm day startup when indoor is below comfort_heat floor despite warm outdoor, heating comfort guard fires to recover comfort
verdict.observed_behavior: warm day with indoor 65F < comfort_heat 70F and outdoor 80F
verdict.expected_behavior: warm_day_comfort_floor guard fires, heat set to comfort_heat 70F

events.note: Warm day morning: outdoor 80F (very hot), but indoor only 65F (below comfort_heat 70F). This is unusual but possible after cold night.
Warm-day classification would normally say hvac_mode=off, but indoor 65F < comfort_heat 70F â€” warm-day comfort-floor guard should fire heat

assertions.reason: Warm-day classification but indoor 65F < comfort_heat 70F — system heats to the comfort floor first (warm_day_comfort_gap) so the occupant is not left cold; HVAC coasts off once at the floor.
